content_fingerprint: openai expands codex documentation with getting started guide and settings tutorial openai has published two new codex learning resources a step by step setup guide and a settings walkthrough signaling a continued push to onboard developers and teams to its cloud hosted code writing agent openai has added two new instructional pages to its codex documentation a how to get started with codex guide and a codex settings tutorial both published on april 23 2026 the timing aligns with the broader rollout of workspace agents in chatgpt which openai describes as codex powered automation tools designe
